Tooling: MATLAB, Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) optimization algorithm, sparse group lasso regularization methods.

Tooling: R programming language, limma package, GEOquery, ggplot2, dplyr, ggrepel, NCBI Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) database, and statistical modeling frameworks including Linear Models and eBayes moderation.
